title: erica viridimontana subsp. nivicola
intro: Erica viridimontana subsp. nivicola, also known as the Alpine Heather, is a plant species belonging to the Ericaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The leaves and flowers of Erica viridimontana subsp. nivicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
